cacheRules.name: ZamSchool — cache private dashboard reads
cacheRules.notes: Origin sends private, max-age=30 via lib/edge-cache.ts. Vary: Authorization.

cacheRules.name: ZamSchool — bypass inbox polling
cacheRules.expression: (http.host eq "your-app.example.com" and (http.request.uri.path eq "/api/account/unread-summary" or http.request.uri.path eq "/api/account/inbox-preview"))

rateLimitRules.name: ZamSchool — auth brute-force guard
rateLimitRules.expression: (http.host eq "your-app.example.com" and http.request.method eq "POST" and starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/api/auth/"))

rateLimitRules.name: ZamSchool — login page POST
rateLimitRules.expression: (http.host eq "your-app.example.com" and http.request.method eq "POST" and http.request.uri.path eq "/login")
